name: Google
description: Google web search provider for OpenClaw backed by SerpApi

webSearch.apiKey.label: SerpApi key
webSearch.apiKey.help: API key used for Google searches through SerpApi

webSearch.location.label: Default location
webSearch.location.help: Applied to searches when no location is passed to web_search

webSearch.country.label: Default country
webSearch.country.help: Two-letter Google country code such as US or ES

webSearch.language.label: Default language
webSearch.language.help: Google UI language code such as en or es

webSearch.safeSearch.label: SafeSearch
webSearch.safeSearch.help: Default SafeSearch mode for Google results

webSearch.count.label: Default result count
webSearch.count.help: How many search results web_search should return by default
